---
title: "Xinran Zhou"
image: profile.jpg

about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 12em
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:zhou.xinran@colostate.edu

    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/xinranzhou2059
---

::: intro-title
Graduate Student in Ecosystem Science & Sustainability\
Colorado State University
:::

Focused on carbon management, environmental data science, and sustainability assessment through life cycle analysis, greenhouse gas accounting, and quantitative environmental-economic research.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Research Interests

My research interests focus on carbon management, greenhouse gas inventories, life cycle assessment (LCA), and environmental-economic analysis. I am particularly interested in applying quantitative modeling and data-driven methods to support low-carbon decision-making in agriculture and energy systems.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Current Research

### LCA-LCC Assessment of Synthetic Humic Substance (SHS) Production and Agricultural Application

- First-author research on four hydrothermal humification technologies for SHS production in China
- Evaluating environmental impacts, economic costs, and process hotspots
- Assessing mitigation potential under regional energy transition scenarios
- Using Simapro, CHINA-SDU-LCIA, and province-level analysis frameworks

### Greenhouse Gas Inventory Analysis

- Estimating emissions using IPCC-based methods and process-based models
- Conducting mitigation analysis in R and COMET-Farm
- Developing scenario-based mitigation strategies for agricultural systems

### Environmental Data Science Applications

- Cleaning, analyzing, and visualizing environmental datasets in R
- Producing reproducible sustainability analyses and technical reports
- Applying statistical methods to evaluate environmental indicators and emissions trends

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Technical Skills

### Environmental Assessment

- Life Cycle Assessment (LCA)
- Life Cycle Costing (LCC)
- Greenhouse Gas Inventories
- Input-Output Analysis

### Programming & Software

- R
- MATLAB
- Stata
- OpenLCA
- SimaPro
- COMET-Farm

### Data Analysis & Reporting

- R Markdown
- Quarto
- Microsoft Excel
- Origin
- Reproducible Reporting

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Education

### Colorado State University

Professional Science Master in Ecosystem Science & Sustainability (Carbon Management)

### Shandong University, China

M.S. in Population, Resources & Environmental Economics

### China University of Geosciences (Wuhan), China

B.A. in Economics, with Distinction

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Selected Honors

- National Scholarship (2023), China
- National Energy Economics Innovation Competition, Second Prize (National-level), China
- International “Internet+” Innovation & Entrepreneurship Competition, Bronze Award, China
- National English Debate Competition, Third Prize, China
